meta.title: Forsure Digitalindo
meta.description: Agency digital premium untuk website profesional, creative content, dan photoshoot berkualitas tinggi.

hero.title:
Build fast.
Ship with confidence.
hero.description: A strict Next.js 15 template with TypeScript, i18n, component-based architecture, Storybook, and a clean service layer. Everything you need, nothing you don't.

features.heading: Everything included
features.subheading: A foundation you'll actually want to build on

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Type-safe i18n with next-intl. Server and client components both supported. Locale routing included.

components.title: Strict Components
components.description: Every component lives in its own directory with full TypeScript types, CVA variants, and Storybook stories.

storybook.title: Storybook 8
storybook.description: Develop and document components in isolation with a11y testing, interactions, and auto-generated docs.

services.title: Service Layer
services.description: A typed fetch client with error handling, caching hints, and request/response interceptors.

testing.title: Vitest + RTL
testing.description: Component tests with Testing Library. Coverage reports. No Jest config headaches.

typescript.title: Strict TypeScript
typescript.description: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, noImplicitReturns, consistent-type-imports and more. No escape hatches.
